title: Add standardized human+machine commit logging artifacts
summary: Standardized commit logging format for future commits.
Added machine-readable JSON alongside human-readable shell log.
Made commit log expectations explicit and parse-friendly.

changes.what: Replaced ad-hoc notes with a stable, sectioned commit log format.
changes.why: Keep logs human-readable and script-friendly in one artifact.
changes.how: Added normalized headings and key=value style entries for parsing.

changes.what: Added machine-readable commit metadata and per-file change entries.
changes.why: Allow automation/reporting systems to ingest commit rationale reliably.
changes.how: Defined a simple JSON schema with summary, changes[], and validation[] blocks.

validation.result: Schema and JSON syntax are valid.
